task_summary: SP19a additive terminal-first human renderer and --format human workaround for issue #18 while retaining html and state outputs.
proof_artifacts: mew work session #46 reviewer follow-up for canonical mew-wisp header

verification_evidence.summary: 29 passed after applying source, test, and README edits.
29 passed after reviewer follow-up changed the terminal human header from historical mew-ghost naming to canonical mew-wisp naming.

implemented_contract.human_format: --format human renders terminal-first plaintext for operator consoles.
implemented_contract.additive_formats: argparse accepts html, state, and human; default remains html.
implemented_contract.html_preserved: render_local_html and the html _render_payload branch remain present for default and explicit HTML output.
implemented_contract.state_preserved: --format state continues to emit deterministic sorted JSON state.
implemented_contract.watch_records: Foreground watch records now carry rendered human text under a human field only when format is human and no output path is used; html records still use html and state records still embed state.
implemented_contract.desk_fixture_surface: Human output includes desk status, counts, details, and primary_action command text for the static desk fixture.
implemented_contract.safety_surfaces: --desk-json, --live-desk, --live-active-window, and --execute-launchers behavior remains covered by the focused test suite; launcher execution remains opt-in and desk primary_action remains non-executable.

covered_cases: human output file does not contain HTML doctype
human output file does not contain JSON schema_version text
human stdout render starts with the terminal human view header
desk fixture primary action appears in human text
README includes the --format human usage command
source isolation test asserts html/state/human choices and render_terminal_human remain present

issue_18_workaround.scope: Small additive SP19a slice under experiments/mew-ghost only.
issue_18_workaround.terminal_first_surface: Human plaintext renderer is available without changing the default HTML output.

acceptance_notes: The implementation intentionally keeps SCHEMA_VERSION at mew-ghost.sp18.v1 because this slice adds a renderer rather than changing the state schema.
An older untracked issue-19 report was already present before this task and was not modified by this SP19a report write.
Reviewer follow-up session #46 changed the human header/test to the canonical mew-wisp name; no Codex product-code rescue edits were used.
remaining_risk: Broad SP19 HTML removal remains deferred behind issue #18; SP19a only adds the terminal human surface.
